message:
Command `WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Pre-PnR STA worst slack ==="
grep -h "MET\|VIOLATED\|wns\|tns\|slack" "$WRAPPER_RUN/08-openroad-staprepnr/"*/max.rpt 2>/dev/null | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== DRT iteration 2 progress (40% done) ==="
grep "Completing\|Start [0-9]*th\|Total wire.*um" /tmp/librelane_final.log | tail -5

echo ""
echo "=== Process status ==="
ps -p 824793 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code 0.
